prestazioni: 3.5L EcoBoost V6 (335A) twin-turbo engine: Full bolt-on turbo upgrade to a pair of Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos with billet compressor wheels, 76mm inducers, and 106mm exducers, paired with a custom Precision Turbo & Engine wastegate actuator setup (18 psi peak boost) and a PTP Turbo 4-inch V-band downpipe system with 304 stainless steel construction and 3.5-inch internal diameter

Fuel system overhaul: Injector Dynamics ID1700x fuel injectors (1,700cc/min flow rate) with a Radium Engineering dual fuel pump hanger (supporting up to 1,200 HP) and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for closed-loop fuel control and individual cylinder trimming

Drivetrain reinforcement: Ford Performance 10R80 10-speed transmission with a Sonnax billet torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) and a PML Level 4 transmission cooler with integrated heat exchanger, paired with a carbon fiber driveshaft from The Driveshaft Shop (rated for 1,500 lb-ft torque) and a Quaife ATB differential for the rear axle (35-spline, 3.73 gear ratio)
estetica: Liberty Walk LB Works widebody kit (Navigator-specific, 4-inch fender flares with carbon fiber construction) paired with a custom front splitter from Seibon Carbon (3-piece design, 4-inch overhang) and a rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (polyurethane construction, integrated LED brake light housing)

Forgiato Trakan 24x12 ET-12 forged wheels (matte bronze finish) with Nitto NT05R 305/35/24 tires, paired with a KW Suspensions Variant 5 coilover system (3-way adjustable damping, 2.5-inch drop) and Air Lift Performance 3P management for static-to-air hybrid setup

Full custom interior by Katzkin: Recaro CS Sportster front seats (heated/ventilated, Alcantara suede with red stitching) paired with a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (6-point, TIG-welded chromoly steel) and a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel (flat-bottom, suede grip) with a quick-release hub from NRG Innovations
